title: Deadline-aware equity lock + crypto-only weekend/finals mode for live loop
source: session 2026-06-10 barbell plan (cut 24-jun evening BST; finals Sat 27-jun crypto-only)
why: Top-100 cut is by account equity at a fixed BST timestamp (18:00 per Discord vs 22:00 per Luma - VERIFY in #rules-and-faq); marked-to-market equity benefits from deliberate de-risking before the print. From Fri 26-jun ~22:00 BST until the Sat 27-jun final only crypto moves equity - holding crypto into the weekend must be an explicit decision, not a default.
scope: --flatten-at <ts> / lock-equity command: reduce gross to 0 (or to crypto-only) at a scheduled UTC time, idempotent, logged
crypto-only mode: rebalance restricted to BTC/ETH/SOL when FX/metals closed or when flagged
runbook entry: decision tree for 24-jun cut and 26-jun weekend hold/flatten
recommendation: Small, high-leverage. Build + test in week 1, rehearse the flatten on a quiet day.

history.reason: Implemented 7afa2d4, risk-officer remediation 88ce179. Equity lock (one-way, persisted, both tick paths, --clear-equity-lock w/ pid guard), --flatten-mode all|non_crypto, --crypto-only (no upward renorm). tz-naive timestamps rejected. docs(strategy): adopt Fable 5 barbell posture + reconcile with PnL-ranking + build state
